data.name: Khao Soi Lamduan Fa Ham Chiang Mai Restaurant
Orchids
data.introduction:
A perfect dining place at the center of Hua Hin 

Orchids has taste in spades – in both the culinary and style senses. Dining in Orchids is different form the others as giving us such a warm atmosphere. We would say “ This place likes home rather than restaurant.”

data.name: Dr. Frogs
data.introduction: Anything’s possible. In this day and age of genetic engineering, scientists can produce the perfect vegetables and livestock. Giving us exactly what we want, such as pest-free tasty corn and succulent lean beef. So it comes as no surprise that restaurateurs are eventually getting the message that we want total perfection in our dining experiences, too, and are creating places that have every possible benefit and absolutely no negative aspects. And Dr. Frogs is a prime example.Recently opened in May 2007, every conceivable thought went into its creation. And that includes everything, from the construction of the restaurant building itself, high up on the edge of one of the most scenic viewpoints on Samui, through to minute details, such as the subtle colour co-ordination of the staff uniforms with the decor.

data.name: Dao Vien
data.introduction: The Overall Attention To Flavour Is Higher Than Many Similarly Priced Vietnamese Restaurants In Town. Lotus Root Salad, A Seasonal Offering, Is A Wonderfully Refreshing Starter Combining Crunchy Sliced Raw Lotus Roots, Roasted Peanuts And Liberal Handfuls Of Herbs With Succulent Pork Slices And Fresh Shrimps In A Clear, Tangy Dressing. Four Season Plate Presents Fresh Spring Rolls And Prawns On Sugar Cane Alongside Outstanding Crispy Fried Spring Rolls Stuffed With Peppery Chunks Of Chicken, Bean Vermicelli And Wood Ear Fungus, And Juicy Grilled Pork Balls. Another Incarnation Of The Hot Appetisers As A Main Course Is Grilled Pork Balls, Grilled Pork And Fried Spring Rolls Served Atop Delicate Strands Of Fermented Rice Noodles. Dao Vien's Only Dessert Is A Lovely Flan-Like Vietnamese Custard With A Dark, Slightly Bitter Caramel Sauce.

data.name: Dusit Thani Pattaya
data.introduction: Dusit Thani Pattaya is located on a private beach in the north of Pattaya. At the resort you can enjoy a variety of water sports at the beach. Dusit Thani Pattaya is also a mix of nature, beaches, sunshine and sea, with the civic culture. Modern room decorated in tropical style providing comfortable relaxation.

sha.name: Dusit Thani Pattaya
sha.detail: Dusit Thani Pattaya Hotel beach resort in Pattaya, Thailand offers Thai luxury and hospitality in the heart of one of Thailand’s prominent beach resort destinations. This five-star Dusit Thani beachfront hotel in Pattaya is conveniently located near the shopping and dining venues of Pattaya City, but its enviable location on the northern end of the majestically curving Gulf of Thailand with direct access to two beachfronts, truly sets it apart from other luxury beach resorts in Pattaya.Situated amidst a tropical garden and boasting stunning panoramic views over Pattaya Bay, this luxury hotel offers the perfect beach getaway in private beach resorts in Pattaya for all types of travellers. Make your next destination this 5-star hotel in Pattaya Beach, Thailand.

sha.name: The Zign Hotel
sha.detail: The Zign Hotel, a masterpiece of a “de-sign art hotel”, is thrived in the modern transformation of Arts throughout the time. The sights and sounds of the exotic destination will bring you an unforgettable holiday created by the perfect combination of a modern lifestyle and tropical paradise.Located under the north Pattaya bay on the charming Wong pra-chan Beach in the north of Pattaya City, The Zign is only 5 minutes away from the city centre, and at an approximate distance of an-hour ride from Suvannabhumi International Airport, and an-hour-and-a-half ride from Bangkok.The Zign Hotel is a five-star property, consists of 2 parts ; buildings (852 rooms) and villas (107 rooms), the villas are set amidst a stunning tropical atmosphere with an adjacent swimming pool as a frontier, the buildings simply put others in town on a different horizon. All types of accommodation fit with arty-crafty interiors and divided into art zones, each having its own prestige, specialty, and all equipped with modern amenities. The Zign also features an exclusive lounge, spa, fitness centre, meeting and event facilities, and dining venues to serve your preferences.

data.name: A-One Bangkok Hotel
data.introduction: All 218 rooms at this 4-star hotel are tailored to satisfy guests' needs. Each room are completed with air conditioning, bathrobes, daily newspaper, in-house movies, desk, restaurant, bar/pub, laundry service/dry cleaning, meeting facilities. Guests can also enjoy massage, pool (kids), gym, sauna, steam room to relax. Since it opened in 2000, the hotel has integrated first-class service and state-of-the-art facilities. Please enter your dates of stay and submit via our secure online booking form to reserve a room at A-One Bangkok Hotel in Bangkok

sha.name: A-ONE BANGKOK HOTEL
sha.detail: A 20-minute drive from Suvarnabhumi International Airport, A-ONE offers 4-star accommodation with a gym and free Wi-Fi in public areas. It features free shuttle to the metro station.Close to Sukhumvit Road with its variety of shopping complexes and Ratchadaphisek's nightlife strip, it is also near the Bangkok metro system.Rooms at A-ONE are designed with a modern feel and contemporary furnishings. The spacious rooms come with a glass window separating the bathroom and sleeping area.After a long day of work or play, indulge with a session at the spa with its traditional Thai massages and body treatments. You can also recharge with a work-out at the fully equipped fitness centre that also has an outdoor swimming pool.Relax with a drink and beautiful music at the Piano Lounge or enjoy an international buffet spread at Gondola Restaurant. There is also a bakery where you can get delicious home-made breads and pastries.

sha.detail: Situated on the private and residential area of Wong Amat Beach, North Pattaya. The resort provides privacy and tranquility whilst offering easy to the main entertainment and shopping areas which are just a few minutes away. With its own beach front the resort has 230 rooms, Stylish restaurants serve the finest Thai and International cuisine as well as delicious bakery treats. The spacious infinity pool overlooks the golden sands of secluded Crescent Moon Beach, directly accessible from the resort.An air of serenity and peace graces the Sanctuary of Truth. This ornate hand-carved wooden sanctuary wooden sanctuary is a popular tourist attraction and a short walk from the resort.

data.name: The Duke's
data.introduction: The Duke's charming open air teakwood villa, art gallery, and courtyard is a favorite restaurant among locals and visitors alike. Originally built in the period of King Rama VI by the Royal Family and used as a vacation home by Prince Damrong Rajanubhab, a younger brother of King Rama V (King Chulalongkorn) and the founder of the "Diskul" family, The Duke's inviting ambience will immediately impress you with several unique dining areas that flow gently into one another among the swaying palms, gentle breeze, and calm of the sea.

sha.name: NAPHA PLA TOD MUN
sha.detail: NA PHA PLATODMUN Restaurant has been service for more than 60 years since 1953. Located on Kosi Road, next to the Chao Pho-Chao Mae Na-Pha shrine. There is parking available. We serve Thai food river fish type. Our highlight menu is Fried Fish Cake with traditional secret recipes dipping sauces and other traditional menus made with real Spotted Featherback fish such as Grated fish fillet spicy soup, Fried fish fins with garlic, Crispy tiny river prawns, Scomberomorus simmered with coconut milk, Beef jerky in coconut milk curry with pickled bamboo shoots and etc. We have been guaranteed by Wongnai , Nakhonsawan Brands, Mae Choi Nang Rum, Quality Product of Nakhonsawan, Krua Khun Toi and etc.

sha.name: KOPI De Phuket
sha.detail: This is a Phuket Chinese style 2 storey cafe that serves a Traditional Thai tea, coffee and local dishes such as Moo Hong (Famous Phuket Braised Pork Belly), noodle soup and various local snacks that are interesting to try. It is located near to the Sino Imperial Hotel in Phuket Town, on the main Phuket Town Road. It provides Free WiFi and has an indoor and small outdoor seating area. When you're in Phuket ,Kopi de Phuket is a must!!!

data.name: Maya
data.introduction: Relish An Exciting And Inspiring Experience At Maya, A Unique Dining And Entertainment Destination On Sukhumvit 22. Perching Atop The Holiday Inn Bangkok Sukhumvit At 29 Floors Above The Enchanting City Of Bangkok, Maya Encompasses Three Impressive Areas That Bring Dining In An Indian Restaurant To An Entirely New Level. Khana Serves An Enticing Northern Indian Cuisine That Perfectly Blends Classic Recipes With The Modern Interpretations To Create A Dynamic And Flavourful Menu. Sigara Invites The Guests To Enjoy A Good Cigar In An Intimate Setting Of The Al Fresco Cigar Lounge That Floats Amidst The Bangkoks Sky, Bara Offers A Stylish Hangout In Which You Can Enjoy Mayas Specialized Cocktails And Mocktails While The Funky Music By Dj Fills The Air. After A Year Of Careful Planning And Meticulous Construction, Maya Wows The Guests With Its Unique And Elegant Decor. An Open Kitchen Showcasing Thailands Three Biggest Copper Tandoors And The Seductive Aroma Of Spices Greet You Upon Entering. The Stunning Details Including The Luxurious Black Onyx, Rare Marbles, And Traditional Indian Steel Work, Are Exquisitely Integrated Into The Design To Create A Unique Atmosphere. Floating On A Largest Cantilever Stand In Thailand, Maya Covers An Area Of 450 Square Meters And Stretches 20 Meters Out From The Building. The City Lights Glistening Through The Floor-To-Ceiling Windows Exude An Extraordinary Ambience. Experience The Maya World For Yourself, And Discover The Charm Of Spending An Evening Amidst The Awe-Inspiring Bangkok Skyline Views.
